title: Dependency Policy
body:
Internal Dependency Policy

All third-party dependency vulnerabilities must be triaged and remediated according to the following severity-to-priority and tag assignments:

- Critical severity: priority = high, tags = security, patch-immediate
- Medium severity: priority = medium, tags = security, patch-scheduled
- Low severity: priority = low, tags = security, patch-deferred

Remediation tickets should be updated immediately with the correct priority and tags once a finding is confirmed.
